expectations.evidence: goals/ contains only README.md, goal-01-webhook-migration.md, and validate.sh — no 00-index.md was created.

expectations.text: Exactly one file under goals/ matches ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}-\d{2}-[a-z0-9-]+\.md$.
expectations.evidence: The goal file is named goal-01-webhook-migration.md, which does not match the required YYYY-MM-DD-NN-slug.md pattern (no date, no zero-padded sequence).

expectations.text: The new goal file contains all 9 required headings in order.
expectations.evidence: File uses a YAML front-matter block (id/title/status/owner/created/updated) followed by heading order # Goal 01 -> ## Context -> ## Objective -> ... — 'Context' is not one of the 9 required headings and 'Objective' is not first; Non-goals/Evidence to update/Stop and ask if headings are absent entirely.

expectations.text: plans/active-context.md references the new goal file's path.
expectations.evidence: No plans/ directory exists anywhere in this project (top-level listing is only goals/ and README.md).

expectations.text: Running python3 scripts/validate_goals.py in the project exits with code 0.
expectations.evidence: scripts/validate_goals.py does not exist in this project (the agent wrote its own goals/validate.sh instead) — running the required command fails with 'No such file or directory'.
